steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content: For infinitely many solutions, both sides must be identical for every $x$. First simplify the left side: $$(12x+28)/4-s/13=3x+7-s/13.$$ The right side is $$r(x-8)=rx-8r.$$

steps.title: Match coefficients
steps.content: The coefficient of $x$ on the left is $3$, so the coefficient of $x$ on the right must also be $3$. Thus, $r=3$.

steps.title: Match constants
steps.content: Substitute $r=3$ and match the constant terms: $$7-s/13=-8(3)=-24$$ $$-s/13=-31$$ $$s=403$$ The answer is 403.
